infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SafeDeliver needs camera access for KYC identity verification to increase your transaction limits.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SafeDeliver needs access to your photo library to allow you to upload your government ID for KYC verification.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow SafeDeliver to access your photos for identity verification.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SafeDeliver to access your camera for identity verification.
